'''vazaza''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:igdloite|igdloite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-z-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:igdloite|igdloite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| vazaza
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:væzæzæth|væzæzæth]] || [[word:væzæzæj|væzæzæj]] || [[word:væzæzæsh|væzæzæsh]] || [[word:væzæzæ|væzæzæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vazazazath|vazazazath]] || [[word:vazazazaj|vazazazaj]] || [[word:vazazazash|vazazazash]] || [[word:vazazaza|vazazaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vazazath|vazazath]] || [[word:vazazaj|vazazaj]] || [[word:vazazash|vazazash]] || [[word:vazaza|vazaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vazafzath|vazafzath]] || [[word:vazafzaj|vazafzaj]] || [[word:vazafzash|vazafzash]] || [[word:vazafzaf|vazafzaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vazazatha|vazazatha]] || [[word:vazazaja|vazazaja]] || [[word:vazazasha|vazazasha]] || [[word:vazazaka|vazazaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vazazath|vazazath]] || [[word:vazazaj|vazazaj]] || [[word:vazazash|vazazash]] || [[word:vazaza|vazaza]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vazazathal|vazazathal]] || [[word:vazazajal|vazazajal]] || [[word:vazazashal|vazazashal]] || [[word:vazazakal|vazazakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vazazathatha|vazazathatha]] || [[word:vazazajaja|vazazajaja]] || [[word:vazazashasha|vazazashasha]] || [[word:vazazaka|vazazaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vazazathan|vazazathan]] || [[word:vazazajan|vazazajan]] || [[word:vazazashan|vazazashan]] || [[word:vazazakan|vazazakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vazazathaoro|vazazathaoro]] || [[word:vazazajaoro|vazazajaoro]] || [[word:vazazashaoro|vazazashaoro]] || [[word:vazazakaoro|vazazakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c4abda}}
